name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for QuickBars

labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ''

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Stop! Have you discussed this yet?**
As per our [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md), please do not start coding until this issue has been discussed and approved by a maintainer.
